title: Mandhaara Lyrics Bhaagamathie

Mandhaaraa Lyrics Bhaagamathie

Mandhaaraa mandhaara
mayilaadum mandaaraa
madalodu thooral thanthaaraa

Mandhaaraa mandhaara
kuralodhum mandaaraa
kuralilyeri kadhalil sendraaraa

kilaiyinil thaavum kaagam

nilai unarvaayaa

unai ariyaamal neeyum
ival man odai mele
oru ilai veesi ponaalum
padarvaayaa

hoo
pollaadha megam pookkum
ennodu porida paarkum

ini ennaagumo
malar mannaagumo
adhai yaendhikolvaayaa

mandhaaraa mandhaara

madalin mele thooral
thanthaaraa

kuralodhum mandaaraa
kuralilyeri kadhalil sendraaraa

ringaaraaa

mayilaadum mandaaraa
madalodu thooral thanthaaraa

vitha vithamaaga
poigalai alli
manadhini poosi
maraithene

nijangalai kaattum
vilambaramaaga

inaithaene

unai vandhu serum aasai

mudhal mudhalaaga ketten
unai adaivenaa

pennodu yeno modhal

nee thinam tharum
kalavaram kalaikkamal
nindrenaa

mandhaaraa mandhaara

seo.title: Mandhaara Lyrics Bhaagamathie
seo.description: Full Mandhaara songs lyrics, Bhaagamathie Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Vivek, Music: Thaman S, Singer(s): Jyotsna Radhakrishnan.
seo.keywords: Vivek, Bhaagamathie, Thaman S, Jyotsna Radhakrishnan, Mandhaara full lyrics, Bhaagamathie songs lyrics, Mandhaara lyrics snippets, Mandhaara WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mandhaara lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mandhaara?

Mandhaara conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions through its lyrics.

How does Mandhaara fit into the plot of Bhaagamathie?

The song plays a significant role in highlighting the romantic elements of the story, enhancing the emotional depth of the characters.

Who is the singer of Mandhaara?

The song is sung by the talented Jyotsna Radhakrishnan, known for her melodious voice.

Who composed the music for Mandhaara?

The music for Mandhaara was composed by Thaman S, who is renowned for his catchy and emotional tunes.

When was Mandhaara released?

Mandhaara was released on January 26, 2018, as part of the movie Bhaagamathie.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mandhaara, the protagonist expresses her deep feelings of love and yearning, beautifully captured through the soothing melody. The song serves as a poignant moment in Bhaagamathie, reflecting the emotional turmoil and romantic essence of the narrative. With its enchanting lyrics and captivating composition, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The heartfelt delivery by Jyotsna Radhakrishnan adds to the song's charm, making it a memorable piece in the film's soundtrack.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mandhaara from Bhaagamathie is a mesmerizing melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With Jyotsna Radhakrishnan's enchanting vocals and Thaman S's captivating composition, this song creates a soothing atmosphere that resonates with the heart. Dive into the lyrical beauty penned by Vivek, and let the magic of Mandhaara sweep you off your feet.
stanzaMeanings: Oh Mandhaara, the one who dances in the sky, you bring a breeze with your playful nature.
Oh Mandhaara, with your voice, you bring a melody that flows into love.
In the branches of the tree, the crow rests, unaware of the water that falls, reflecting your state of mind.
Without knowing you, even if you blow a leaf on her heart, will it make a sound?
Oh, the dark cloud that blooms, will it see my departure?
What will happen now, will it be like a flower or will it be something else?
Oh Mandhaara, the one who dances in the heart, you bring a breeze with your playful nature.
Oh Mandhaara, with your voice, you bring a melody that flows into love.
Oh Mandhaara, you have come, oh thieves, ring the bell!
Oh Mandhaara, the one who dances in the sky, you bring a breeze with your playful nature.
In a different way, I hide my feelings in the heart.
I have captured the smile that reveals the truth in a playful manner.
I have come to you with a desire, the sound of life will be the first thing I hear when I meet you.
What is it with women, is there something special? Your love gives me a daily challenge, should I stay without getting involved?
Oh Mandhaara, the one who dances in the heart, you bring a breeze with your playful nature.
Oh Mandhaara, with your voice, you bring a melody that flows into love.
Oh Mandhaara, you have come, oh thieves, ring the bell!
Oh Mandhaara, the one who dances in the sky, you bring a breeze with your playful nature.
